prompt: A surreal, non-literal conceptual scene illustrating the friendship paradox. A lone central figure stands in a sparse space, connected by thin threads to a few surrounding figures. Each of those surrounding figures expands into dense, intricate networks of many more interconnected figures, forming visually overwhelming clusters. The composition emphasizes contrast between the central figure’s small network and the vast, complex networks of their connections. No text, no symbols, no numbers, no charts. Atmospheric, slightly uncanny mood, soft lighting, minimal background, focus on relational structure and visual imbalance rather than literal storytelling --no text, no labels, no infographic elements, no diagrams
visual_logic: A central figure has few connections, but each connected person expands into dense networks, making others appear more connected overall, creating a structural imbalance between local and global perception.
